ead.archdesc:

This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Ludwig Wittgenstein manuscript notebooks
Wittgenstein, Ludwig, 1889-1951.
Wittgenstein, Ludwig, 1889-1951. (Title of work: Philosophische Bemerkungen..)
Wittgenstein, Ludwig, 1889-1951. (Title of work: Philosophische Grammatik..)
Wittgenstein, Ludwig, 1889-1951. (Title of work: Grundlagen der Mathematik..)
Wittgenstein, Ludwig, 1889-1951. (Title of work: Anmerkungen..)
6880
98 volumes. 98 volumes.
1914-1951. Manuscripts, Research Materials Incomplete set of Wittgenstein's manuscript notes. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 88a 88b 88c 89c 89d 89c 89d ======= 88a 88b 88c 89c 89d 89c 89d >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 6831602
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2010
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, April 2010
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Incomplete set of Wittgenstein's manuscript notes, including several pre-Tractatus notebooks, and notes for Philosophische Bemerkungen, Philosophische Grammatik, Grundlagen der Mathematik, Philosophische Untersuchungen (fair copy of part 2), Anmerkungen, "Philosophical Lecture," and other works. Volumes are numbered 1-105b, but several volumes are lacking: v. 1, 6, 28, 43, 59, 72-73, 80-84, 87, 91-92, 95, 97, and 104. A few volume numbers are also used more than once (as in v. 53a and 53b, 56a and 56b, etc.). Bound in red library buckram.
Restrictions on Use:
May not be quoted or reproduced without permission of the owner of the originals.
Cite As:
Ludwig Wittgenstein manuscript notebooks, #6880. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Wittgenstein, Ludwig, 1889-1951.
